nasb.text: Joab said, “As God lives, if you had not spoken, surely then the people would have gone away in the morning, each from following his brother.”

esv.text: And Joab said, “As God lives, if you had not spoken, surely the men would not have given up the pursuit of their brothers until the morning.”

cnv.text: 約押說：“我指著永活的　神起誓，如果你沒有說過比武的話，大家必在早晨的時候離去，不再追趕自己的兄弟。”

ccb.text: 约押说：“我凭永活的上帝起誓，你要是不这样说，我们会一直追到天亮。”
